home.tips_content: Selbstbewusste Mädchen sind am schönsten! Egal welche Bewertung die KI abgibt, du bist eine einzigartige Schönheit auf dieser Welt~ Vergiss nicht, jeden Tag glücklich zu sein! 🦆

download_dialog.title: Hinweis
download_dialog.content:
Es wird empfohlen, die Registrierung/Anmeldung auf dieser Seite abzuschließen, bevor Sie die App herunterladen.

Dies stellt sicher, dass Ihre Empfehlungsprämien korrekt gespeichert werden und Sie alle Dienste nutzen können! ✨

member.title: Mitgliederbereich
member.invite_code_desc: Teilen Sie Ihren Code, beide erhalten Boni bei Registrierung!
member.points_redeem_desc: Verdienen Sie 1 Punkt pro erfolgreicher Einladung. Gegen Bargeld einlösbar!
member.referral_step1_desc: Kopieren Sie Ihren Code und senden Sie ihn an Freunde.
member.referral_step2_desc: Ihre Freunde geben diesen Code bei der Anmeldung ein.

compliance.monthly_gift_desc: Erhalten Sie monatlich 5 Gratis-Credits mit einem Gutscheincode.
compliance.friend_reg_desc: Verdienen Sie 1 Credit pro erfolgreicher Freundesregistrierung.
compliance.commission_desc_full: Wenn Ihr Geworbener auflädt, erhalten Sie eine cash-Provision von 40%!
compliance.need_help: Brauchen Sie Hilfe? Kontaktieren Sie uns per E-Mail:
compliance.terms_content:
Willkommen im Beauty-Labor. Durch die Nutzung unserer Dienste erklären Sie sich mit den folgenden Bedingungen einverstanden:
1. Art des Dienstes: Das Beauty-Labor bietet KI-gestützte Bildanalysen an. Die Ergebnisse werden von KI-Modellen generiert und sollten nur zu Unterhaltungszwecken verwendet werden.
2. Nutzerinhalte: Sie sind für die von Ihnen hochgeladenen Fotos verantwortlich. Sie müssen die Nutzungsrechte besitzen und dürfen nicht gegen Gesetze verstoßen.
3. Konto und Guthaben: Gekaufte Credits sind an Ihr Konto gebunden. Sie sind für die Sicherheit Ihres Kontozugangs verantwortlich.
4. Haftungsausschluss: Wir garantieren nicht für die absolute Genauigkeit der KI-Ergebnisse. Der Dienst wird „wie besehen“ bereitgestellt.
compliance.privacy_content:
Im Beauty-Labor hat Ihr Datenschutz Priorität:
1. Datenerhebung: Wir erheben nur Geräte-IDs und die von Ihnen hochgeladenen Fotos für die KI-Analyse.
2. Datennutzung: Hochgeladene Fotos werden von KI-Modellen (Google Gemini) verarbeitet und nicht für andere Zwecke verwendet.
3. Datenspeicherung: Wir speichern Ihr Guthaben und Ihre Bestellhistorie sicher; wir verkaufen keine Daten an Dritte.
4. Sicherheit: Wir setzen branchenübliche Sicherheitsmaßnahmen zum Schutz Ihrer Informationen ein.
compliance.refund_content:
Unsere Rückerstattungsrichtlinie sorgt für Fairness:
1. Digitale Güter: Da der Dienst sofortige KI-Verarbeitung und digitale Credits bietet, werden Rückerstattungen in der Regel nach Verwendung der Credits nicht gewährt.
2. Technische Probleme: Falls Credits abgezogen, aber kein Ergebnis generiert wurde, kontaktieren Sie uns bitte für eine manuelle Gutschrift.
3. Zufriedenheit: Wenn Sie unzufrieden sind, wenden Sie sich bitte an unser Support-Team; wir bearbeiten jeden Fall individuell.
4. Kontakt: Für Rückerstattungsanfragen senden Sie bitte eine E-Mail an 408457641@qq.com.

simple_tryon.result_title: Ta-da! Here is your try-on result:

tests.ocean_o_high: High openness: You are curious, open-minded, and dare to challenge authority and tradition.
tests.ocean_o_low: Low openness: You are steady and practical, preferring existing, concrete, and traditional things.
tests.ocean_o_mid: Moderate Openness: You find a good balance between creativity and pragmatism.
tests.ocean_c_high: High Conscientiousness: You are extremely self-disciplined, methodical, and an extremely reliable achiever.
tests.ocean_c_low: Low conscientiousness: You are free-spirited and do not like to be bound by rules, and may sometimes appear inefficient.
tests.ocean_c_mid: Moderate conscientiousness: You can handle your work well while also leaving yourself room for flexibility.
tests.ocean_e_high: High extraversion: You gain energy from social interactions, are sociable, and are full of energy.
tests.ocean_e_low: Low Extraversion: You are an introvert who recharges through solitude and enjoys deep quiet.
tests.ocean_e_mid: Moderate extraversion: You have a mixed personality, switching easily between being alone and social.
tests.ocean_a_high: High Agreeableness: You are altruistic, considerate, and well-liked by those around you.
tests.ocean_a_low: Low Agreeableness: You have a strong sense of competition, speak straightforwardly, and sometimes appear a little cold.
tests.ocean_a_mid: Moderate Agreeableness: You know how to care about others, but you can also stick to your own principles when necessary.
tests.ocean_n_high: High neuroticism: You are emotionally sensitive and can quickly detect changes in the environment, but you are also prone to anxiety.
tests.ocean_n_low: Low neuroticism (extremely stable): You are extremely emotionally stable, have amazing ability to withstand stress, and can face various challenges calmly.
tests.ocean_n_mid: Moderate mood swings: Your emotional state is at the average level.
tests.ocean_subtitle: International Standard Big Five Personality Test
tests.what_to_do_today: What are you going to do today?
tests.what_to_do_placeholder: Such as: going for an interview, dating, moving...
tests.calendar_btn: Check good luck and outfit suggestions
tests.couple_face_prompt: Analyze whether the facial features of the two faces match, and provide a couple score and emotional advice.
tests.dp_desc_healthy: Congratulations! Your emotional state is very healthy and you are not prone to depression.
tests.dp_adv_healthy: Continue to maintain a positive and optimistic attitude towards life, exercise more, socialize more, and maintain good work and rest habits.
tests.dp_desc_mild: You may have some mild mood swings, which is a normal response to life stress.
tests.dp_adv_mild: It is recommended to adjust your work and rest appropriately, increase exercise and social activities, and develop some interests and hobbies. If you continue to feel troubled, talk to a friend.
tests.dp_desc_moderate: You may be experiencing a level of emotional distress and need to pay attention to your mental health.
tests.dp_adv_moderate: It is recommended to seek support from family and friends and consider consulting a professional psychological counselor. Maintain a regular schedule, exercise appropriately, and avoid being alone for too long.
tests.dp_desc_severe: You may have obvious depression tendencies, and it is recommended to seek professional help as soon as possible.
tests.dp_adv_severe: It is highly recommended to schedule an appointment with a professional psychologist or psychiatrist for evaluation and treatment as soon as possible. Please tell your relatives and friends how you feel and don’t bear it alone.
tests.dp_desc_critical: Your test results indicate that you may be suffering from severe depression, please seek professional help immediately.
tests.dp_adv_critical: Please contact the psychological crisis intervention hotline (national: 400-161-9995) immediately or go to the hospital psychiatric department for treatment. You are not alone and professional help can help you get better.
tests.medical_disclaimer: Disclaimer: This test is for reference only and is not a substitute for professional medical diagnosis. If necessary, please consult a professional psychologist.
tests.hotline_2: Beijing Psychological Crisis Research and Intervention Center: 010-82951332
tests.eq_analysis_excellent: You have extremely high emotional intelligence and are a leader in social and professional situations. Not only do you have perfect control over yourself, you can also profoundly influence others.
tests.eq_str_excellent: Extremely insightful, emotionally stable, with strong charisma and leadership.
tests.eq_weak_excellent: Sometimes you may put pressure on those around you by being too perfect, or you may sacrifice too much because you consider other people's feelings.
tests.eq_sug_excellent: Try to show a more authentic and relaxed side on certain occasions, and balance the ratio of emotion and rationality in decision-making.
tests.eq_analysis_high: Your emotional intelligence is very good, you can handle most social situations with ease, and you have strong emotional regulation ability.
tests.eq_str_high: Strong empathy, harmonious interpersonal relationships, and good at self-regulation.
tests.eq_weak_high: Under extreme stress, there is a risk of occasional mood swings.
tests.eq_sug_high: Further deepen the awareness of subconscious emotions and improve the ability to withstand emotional stress in high-pressure environments.
tests.eq_analysis_medium: You have a basic awareness of emotion management, but there is still room for improvement in the face of complex interpersonal games or large mood swings.
tests.eq_str_medium: Be friendly, have certain communication skills, and have a positive work attitude.
tests.eq_weak_medium: Sometimes it is easy to be swayed by emotions, or appear passive in social interactions.
tests.eq_sug_medium: It is recommended to practice more mindfulness meditation to improve self-awareness; learn more active communication skills and bravely express needs.
tests.eq_lvl_needs_improvement: Emotional intelligence needs to be improved
tests.eq_analysis_needs_improvement: You may be currently in an emotionally sensitive period, or have encountered some obstacles in interpersonal communication and need to pay more attention to your inner world.
tests.eq_str_needs_improvement: He is pure in heart, persistent, and has strong concentration in specific areas.
tests.eq_weak_needs_improvement: Easily impulsive, not good at picking up cues from others, and has a single way of self-regulation.
tests.eq_sug_needs_improvement: Systematically study emotion management courses; try to keep an emotional diary every day; participate in more social activities to practice listening.
tests.complete_and_start: Complete and start a charming life
tests.eye_slogan: ✨ Look at your eyes to know your health ~
tests.eye_desc_1: Based on the theory of "Five Wheels Theory" of traditional Chinese medicine
tests.eye_desc_2: Observe the health status of your organs from 5 specific angles
tests.medical_disclaimer_short: - The results of this procedure are for reference only and are not used as a basis for actual diagnosis and treatment -
tests.eye_req_1: · Sufficient light and no obstruction, do not wear glasses or contact lenses.
tests.eye_req_2: · Try to have someone else assist you in shooting to ensure clear focus.
tests.privacy_notice: -- We will protect your personal privacy and will not keep the photos taken --
tests.wangyan_analysis: Dialectical analysis of looking at the eyes
tests.eye_medical_disclaimer_long: This AI report is generated based on the Five Wheels Theory of Traditional Chinese Medicine and is intended to provide general health reference. It cannot replace face-to-face examination and medical advice from professional doctors. If you feel unwell, please be sure to go to a regular medical institution for treatment.
tests.feng_shui_prompt: Analyze the layout of the office desk or home furnishings in the picture, and provide Feng Shui scores and improvement suggestions.
tests.upload_room_corner: Take a photo and upload a corner of your desk or room
tests.upload_clear_photo: Please upload a clear frontal photo
tests.your_hairstyle_result: This is your hair style rendering:
tests.iq_desc_average: Your thinking ability is at the average level of the general public.
tests.iq_desc_genius: Your intellectual performance is extremely remarkable, you have strong logical structure and abstract thinking ability, and you belong to the top 1% in the world.
tests.iq_desc_superior: You have excellent thinking agility and logical integration skills, and your efficiency in solving complex problems is much higher than ordinary people.
tests.iq_desc_high_average: You can handle logical relationships well, have stable cognitive abilities and strong learning potential.
tests.iq_desc_potential: Perhaps due to your state or preference during the test, your performance is slightly below average. It is recommended to do more logical thinking training.
tests.iq_advice: Intelligence is not fixed. Through in-depth logical practice, cross-field learning and maintaining curiosity, cognitive boundaries can continue to be broadened.
tests.upload_limit_6: Only up to 6 photos can be uploaded
tests.jade_upload_hint: Supports multiple angles, macro, and transmitted light (up to 6 photos)
tests.upload_photo_to_analyze: After uploading the photo, AI will provide you with an in-depth analysis report
tests.jade_advice_1: Provide front-on photos under natural light to show the truest colors.
tests.jade_advice_2: Provides strong light transmission to help observe the internal structure.
tests.jade_advice_3: Take macro shots of the surface to observe microscopic features such as "greenness".
tests.upload_photo_for_partner: Please upload a frontal photo of yourself so that AI can generate a more suitable partner~
tests.ai_generated_partner: ✨ AI generates a "destined match" based on your appearance and numerology ✨
tests.generate_partner_image: Generate a portrait of your ideal partner
tests.upload_photo_precise: Upload your frontal photo for more accurate matching
tests.photo_credit_hint: Tip: Generating an image will consume an additional credit.
tests.marriage_principle_desc: This function combines the essence of traditional Chinese eight-character numerology with modern AI large models to accurately convert the lunar calendar and analyze the five elements. We will analyze for you the perfect timing for the appearance of your right destiny, and outline your destined Ta for you based on the principles of physiognomy.
tests.career_advice: Avoidance pitfalls and suggestions in the workplace
tests.mbti_disclaimer: Note: The test results are based on the MBTI theoretical model and are intended to provide career reference. Personal development is affected by a variety of realistic factors. Please make decisions based on actual conditions.
tests.wealth_guide_principle: The principles of making money guide
tests.wealth_guide_desc: Based on the prosperity and decline of the wealth stars in the horoscopes of birth and the distribution of the ten gods, combined with the direction of wealth over time, AI technology is used to analyze your wealth throughout your life. It not only provides predictions of prosperous years, but also gives specific career change suggestions and prosperous fortunes based on your numerology and five elements.

tests.dp_q_77: Do you feel that life is meaningless?
tests.dp_q_78: do you often think about death
tests.dp_q_79: Have you ever acted in a way that hurt yourself?
tests.dp_q_80: Have you ever had a specific plan to commit suicide?
tests.hair_pompadour_desc: An upgraded version of the classic airplane head, matte hair mud creates a natural fluffy texture
tests.hair_wolf_desc: Shorten the length behind the head, suitable for commuting, giving a very youthful look
tests.hair_french_desc: Classic back comb style, bright and neat, gentlemanly retro style
tests.hair_fade_desc: The gradient spreads out in a semicircle around the ears, giving it a strong sense of structure.
tests.hair_medium_desc: Artistic style with long broken hair, slightly curly ends, lazy and advanced style
tests.hair_mod_desc: Rich layers, bangs covering the forehead, uninhibited rock and roll feel
tests.hair_buzz_desc: The skin is completely visible on the side, with simple geometric lines
tests.hair_comma_desc: The bangs are curved inward like a comma, and the facial features are prominent
tests.hair_sideback_desc: Modern side parting, retaining natural luster, moisturizing and professional
tests.hair_messy_desc: Covers the forehead, creates a messy layered look, and has an age-reducing effect
tests.hair_cub_desc: Short hair with soft curls, playful and cute
tests.hair_butterfly_desc: Clear layers, fluffy and natural, romantic and smart
tests.hair_birkin_desc: Airy bangs, French style, lazy and elegant
tests.hair_cloudbob_desc: Fluffy, full and short hair, sweet and gentle
tests.hair_collarbone_desc: Length to the clavicle, capable and intellectual
tests.hair_mullet_desc: Short in front and long in back, with bold personality
tests.hair_mermaid_desc: Long hair, big waves, fairy spirit fluttering
tests.hair_curtain_desc: Character bangs make your face smaller, gentle and sweet
